# CivicLens Presentation Templates

**Generated by Agent 4 | April 2026**

This document contains presentation template specifications and setup instructions for CivicLens.

## Color Palette for Presentations

### Primary Colors
| Name | Hex | RGB | Usage |
|------|-----|-----|-------|
| Dark Navy | `#002444` | 0, 36, 68 | Headers, backgrounds, primary text |
| Navy Container | `#1A3A5C` | 26, 58, 92 | Secondary headers, borders |
| White | `#FFFFFF` | 255, 255, 255 | Text on dark, backgrounds |

### Background Colors
| Name | Hex | RGB | Usage |
|------|-----|-----|-------|
| Surface | `#F7F9FB` | 247, 249, 251 | Light backgrounds |
| Surface Container Low | `#F2F4F6` | 242, 244, 246 | Footer bars |
| Light Blue | `#EFF6FF` | 239, 246, 255 | Accent boxes, highlights |
| Light Green | `#F0FDF4` | 240, 253, 244 | Success states, Gemma box |

### Status Colors
| Name | Hex | RGB | Usage |
|------|-----|-----|-------|
| Success Green | `#10B981` | 16, 185, 129 | Checkmarks, positive indicators |
| Warning Amber | `#F59E0B` | 245, 158, 11 | Cautions, medium confidence |
| Error Red | `#EF4444` | 239, 68, 68 | Errors, low confidence |
| Neutral Gray | `#64748B` | 100, 116, 139 | Secondary text, disabled |

---

## Typography Specifications

**Font Family:** Inter (Google Font)

### Slide Title
- Size: 48pt
- Weight: Bold (700)
- Color: `#002444` (Dark Navy)
- Letter spacing: -0.02em

### Slide Subtitle
- Size: 32pt
- Weight: Regular (400)
- Color: `#002444` or `#FFFFFF` (on dark bg)

### Body Text / Bullets
- Size: 28pt
- Weight: Regular (400)
- Color: `#191C1E` (Near black)
- Line height: 1.5

### Caption/Footer
- Size: 18pt
- Weight: Regular (400)
- Color: `#64748B` (Neutral)

### Header Bar Text
- Size: 28pt (logo), 24pt (slide title)
- Weight: Semi-bold (600)
- Color: `#FFFFFF` (White)

---

## Slide Layout Specifications

### 1. Title Slide

**Background:** Gradient from `#002444` to `#1A3A5C` (subtle)

**Elements:**
- Main Title: "CivicLens" - centered, 72pt, white, bold
- Subtitle: "Privacy-First Civic Document Intelligence" - centered, 32pt, white
- Tagline: "Helping residents navigate SNAP recertification and school enrollment" - centered, 24pt, white/light
- Footer: "Gemma 4 Good Hackathon | April 2026" - bottom center, 18pt, white

### 2. Content Slide

**Header Bar:**
- Height: 120px (or ~1.25 inches)
- Background: `#002444`
- Left: "CivicLens" text (28pt, white)
- Right: Slide title placeholder (24pt, white)

**Main Content Area:**
- Background: `#FFFFFF`
- Padding: 60px from edges
- Title: 48pt, bold, navy
- Bullet points: 28pt, regular, dark gray
- Bullet style: Solid circle, navy color

**Footer Bar:**
- Height: 60px (or ~0.6 inches)
- Background: `#F2F4F6`
- Left: "CivicLens | Gemma 4 Good" (18pt, gray)
- Right: Page number placeholder (18pt, gray)

### 3. Architecture/Diagram Slide

**Header:** Same as Content Slide

**Main Area:**
- Background: `#F7F9FB` (light gray-blue)
- Centered diagram with connected boxes
- Box size: ~200x150px
- Box border: 2px solid `#1A3A5C`
- Box border radius: 4px
- Arrow color: `#002444`
- Caption: 24pt, centered, gray

**Footer:** Same as Content Slide

---

## Google Slides Setup Instructions

### Step 1: Create New Presentation
1. Go to [Google Slides](https://slides.new)
2. Create a blank presentation
3. Name it "CivicLens Template"

### Step 2: Set Up Theme Colors
1. Go to **Slide** → **Edit theme**
2. Click **Colors** (paint palette icon)
3. Choose **Custom** and set:
   - Text 1: `#002444`
   - Text 2: `#191C1E`
   - Background 1: `#FFFFFF`
   - Background 2: `#F7F9FB`
   - Accent 1: `#002444`
   - Accent 2: `#1A3A5C`
   - Accent 3: `#10B981`
   - Accent 4: `#F59E0B`
   - Accent 5: `#EF4444`
   - Accent 6: `#EFF6FF`

### Step 3: Set Up Fonts
1. In theme editor, click **Font**
2. Set all fonts to **Inter** (or choose from Google Fonts)

### Step 4: Create Title Slide Layout
1. In theme editor, duplicate "Blank" layout
2. Rename to "Title Slide"
3. Set background: Gradient from `#002444` to `#1A3A5C`
4. Add text boxes:
   - Title: 72pt, white, centered
   - Subtitle: 32pt, white, centered
   - Footer: 18pt, white, bottom center

### Step 5: Create Content Slide Layout
1. Duplicate "Blank" layout
2. Rename to "Content Slide"
3. Add shapes:
   - Header rectangle: Full width, 120px height, `#002444`
   - Footer rectangle: Full width, 60px height, `#F2F4F6`
4. Add text placeholders:
   - Header left: "CivicLens" (28pt, white)
   - Header right: Slide title placeholder (24pt, white)
   - Main title: 48pt, navy
   - Body: Bullet point placeholder (28pt)
   - Footer left: "CivicLens | Gemma 4 Good" (18pt, gray)
   - Footer right: Page number (18pt, gray)

### Step 6: Create Architecture Slide Layout
1. Duplicate "Content Slide" layout
2. Rename to "Architecture Slide"
3. Change main background to `#F7F9FB`
4. Add diagram elements (boxes and arrows)

### Step 7: Save Theme
1. Click **X** to close theme editor
2. Your layouts are now available in the **+** menu

---

## PowerPoint Setup Instructions

### Step 1: Create New Presentation
1. Open PowerPoint
2. Create a blank presentation
3. Go to **Design** → **Slide Size** → **Widescreen (16:9)**

### Step 2: Set Up Color Theme
1. Go to **Design** → **Variants** → **Colors** → **Customize Colors**
2. Set custom colors:
   - Text/Background - Dark 1: `#002444`
   - Text/Background - Light 1: `#FFFFFF`
   - Text/Background - Dark 2: `#191C1E`
   - Text/Background - Light 2: `#F7F9FB`
   - Accent 1: `#002444`
   - Accent 2: `#1A3A5C`
   - Accent 3: `#10B981`
   - Accent 4: `#F59E0B`
   - Accent 5: `#EF4444`
   - Accent 6: `#EFF6FF`
3. Name the theme "CivicLens" and save

### Step 3: Set Up Fonts
1. Go to **Design** → **Variants** → **Fonts** → **Customize Fonts**
2. Set:
   - Heading font: Inter
   - Body font: Inter
3. Name "CivicLens Fonts" and save

### Step 4: Create Title Slide Master
1. Go to **View** → **Slide Master**
2. Duplicate the Title Slide layout
3. Set background: Gradient fill from `#002444` to `#1A3A5C`
4. Add text placeholders:
   - Title: 72pt, white, bold
   - Subtitle: 32pt, white
   - Footer: 18pt, white

### Step 5: Create Content Slide Master
1. Duplicate the Title and Content layout
2. Add header shape: Rectangle, full width, 1.25" height, `#002444`
3. Add footer shape: Rectangle, full width, 0.6" height, `#F2F4F6`
4. Add text boxes:
   - Header left: "CivicLens" (28pt, white)
   - Header right: Slide title (24pt, white)
   - Main title: 48pt, navy
   - Body: Content placeholder (28pt)
   - Footer left: "CivicLens | Gemma 4 Good" (18pt, gray)
   - Footer right: Page number (18pt, gray)

### Step 6: Create Architecture Slide Master
1. Duplicate Content Slide master
2. Change background to `#F7F9FB`
3. Add diagram boxes and arrows

### Step 7: Close Master View
1. Click **Close Master View**
2. Your templates are ready to use

---

## Slide Content Guidelines

### Title Slide Content
```
CivicLens
Privacy-First Civic Document Intelligence
Helping residents navigate SNAP recertification and school enrollment

Gemma 4 Good Hackathon | April 2026
```

### Content Slide Structure
```
[Header] CivicLens | [Slide Title]

[Main Title - 48pt bold]

• Bullet point 1 (28pt)
• Bullet point 2 (28pt)
• Bullet point 3 (28pt)

[Footer] CivicLens | Gemma 4 Good                    [Page #]
```

### Architecture Slide Structure
```
[Header] CivicLens | On-Device Inference Architecture

[Diagram: Phone Camera → Blur Detection → Gemma 4 E2B → Results]

"On-device inference pipeline - documents never leave the phone"

[Footer] CivicLens | Gemma 4 Good                    [Page #]
```

## Exporting from Stitch

To use the Stitch-generated designs as references:

1. Go to the Stitch project: https://stitch.google.com/projects/7798513403930064434
2. Open each presentation screen
3. Take screenshots or download the HTML
4. Use as visual references when building your presentations

---

## Best Practices

1. **Consistency:** Always use the specified colors and fonts
2. **White Space:** Maintain generous padding and margins
3. **Readability:** Minimum 28pt for body text in presentations
4. **Contrast:** Ensure high contrast for projection visibility
5. **Branding:** Include "CivicLens" and "Gemma 4 Good" on every slide
6. **Simplicity:** Avoid decorative elements, keep it institutional
